title: Training Budget and Professional Development Requests
text:
Q: How can I request funding for training and professional development?
A: Employees can request funding for training and professional development through the Professional Development Request Form available on the HR portal. To initiate the process, complete the form detailing the training program, its relevance to your role, and the associated costs. Submit your request at least 30 days prior to the training date to allow for adequate review and approval. The HR department will evaluate requests based on budget availability and alignment with company goals. You will receive a response within 10 business days of submission. For any questions or assistance, please contact the HR team at hr@company.com.
